nodes.bios: Hii! My name is Emily and I initiated spring quarter of my third year here at UCI. I enjoy playing all kinds of sports, such as volleyball, basketball, and badminton, and going outdoors. I also recently got into plants and I started off with four succulents. I am always down to try new things and go on adventures whether it be for food, boba, or sightseeing! Ask me about anything! (-:
